content: Per-package license declared in package.json 'license' field. CI fails if missing. AGPL for apps/*, MIT for packages/sdk|cli|geo|data, MPL-2.0 for packages/basemap|tools. Plugin manifests must carry SPDX identifier.

title: AGPL/MPL/MIT license split
rationale: apps/* = AGPL-3.0 (SaaS moat). packages/sdk|cli|geo|data = MIT (ecosystem velocity — closed tools can read/write .atlasdraw). packages/basemap|tools = MPL-2.0 (file-level copyleft, library-friendly). Rules out open-core split: all features ship in OSS under AGPL.

description: OpenMoji (CC BY-SA 4.0) and game-icons.net (CC BY 3.0) icons are incompatible with MIT asset library due to share-alike provisions. Cannot bundle in packages/tools under MIT.
resolution: Use Phosphor Icons, Heroicons, Lucide, or in-house SVGs only (all MIT/Apache).

name: OSM and OpenMapTiles required attribution string
description: Required attribution on all map views: '© OpenStreetMap contributors (openstreetmap.org/copyright) | © OpenMapTiles'
